Variables.Name: Density
Variables.Description: Density - 0.0 < 0.85 < 1.0 - Coloration of the late reverb - lower value is more grainy

Variables.Name: Diffusion
Variables.Description: Diffusion - 0.0 < 0.85 < 1.0 - Echo density in the reverberation decay - lower is more grainy

Variables.Name: Gain
Variables.Description: Reverb Gain - 0.0 < 0.32 < 1.0 - overall reverb gain - master volume control

Variables.Name: GainHF
Variables.Description: Reverb Gain High Frequency - 0.0 < 0.89 < 1.0 - attenuates the high frequency reflected sound

Variables.Name: DecayTime
Variables.Description: Decay Time - 0.1 < 1.49 < 20.0 Seconds - larger is more reverb

Variables.Name: DecayHFRatio
Variables.Description: Decay High Frequency Ratio - 0.1 < 0.83 < 2.0 - how much the quicker or slower the high frequencies decay relative to the lower frequencies.

Variables.Name: ReflectionsGain
Variables.Description: Reflections Gain - 0.0 < 0.05 < 3.16 - controls the amount of initial reflections

Variables.Name: ReflectionsDelay
Variables.Description: Reflections Delay - 0.0 < 0.007 < 0.3 Seconds - the time between the listener receiving the direct path sound and the first reflection

Variables.Name: LateGain
Variables.Description: Late Reverb Gain - 0.0 < 1.26 < 10.0 - gain of the late reverb

Variables.Name: LateDelay
Variables.Description: Late Reverb Delay - 0.0 < 0.011 < 0.1 Seconds - time difference between late reverb and first reflections

Variables.Name: AirAbsorptionGainHF
Variables.Description: Air Absorption - 0.0 < 0.994 < 1.0 - lower value means more absorption
